2026-04-14T02:34:08.8511186Z ---
2026-04-14T02:34:08.8511674Z description: |
2026-04-14T02:34:08.8512343Z   Documentation gap detector for the Azure SDK repository
2026-04-14T02:34:08.8553306Z   Triggered on every push to main, analyzes diffs to identify documentation
2026-04-14T02:34:08.8554202Z   gaps and files GitHub issues for Copilot coding agent to implement
2026-04-14T02:34:08.8554670Z 
2026-04-14T02:34:08.8554845Z on:
2026-04-14T02:34:08.8555187Z   push:
2026-04-14T02:34:08.8555551Z     branches: [main]
2026-04-14T02:34:08.8555960Z   workflow_dispatch:
2026-04-14T02:34:08.8556207Z 
2026-04-14T02:34:08.8556381Z permissions: read-all
2026-04-14T02:34:08.8556625Z 
2026-04-14T02:34:08.8556791Z network: defaults
2026-04-14T02:34:08.8557314Z 
2026-04-14T02:34:08.8557496Z safe-outputs:
2026-04-14T02:34:08.8557897Z   report-failure-as-issue: false
2026-04-14T02:34:08.8558358Z   create-issue:
2026-04-14T02:34:08.8558732Z     max: 1
2026-04-14T02:34:08.8559083Z   noop:
2026-04-14T02:34:08.8559440Z     report-as-issue: false
2026-04-14T02:34:08.8559860Z   jobs:
2026-04-14T02:34:08.8560200Z     dispatch_triage:
2026-04-14T02:34:08.8560827Z       description: "Dispatch the issue triage workflow for the newly created issue"
2026-04-14T02:34:08.8561543Z       runs-on: ubuntu-latest
2026-04-14T02:34:08.8561977Z       needs: safe_outputs
2026-04-14T02:34:08.8562418Z       output: "Triage workflow dispatched"
2026-04-14T02:34:08.8562918Z       permissions:
2026-04-14T02:34:08.8563297Z         actions: write
2026-04-14T02:34:08.8563688Z         issues: write
2026-04-14T02:34:08.8564072Z       steps:
2026-04-14T02:34:08.8564463Z         - name: Dispatch triage workflow
2026-04-14T02:34:08.8564995Z           uses: actions/github-script@v9
2026-04-14T02:34:08.8565465Z           env:
2026-04-14T02:34:08.8566067Z             CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER: "${{ needs.safe_outputs.outputs.created_issue_number }}"
2026-04-14T02:34:08.8566758Z           with:
2026-04-14T02:34:08.8572221Z             script: |
2026-04-14T02:34:08.8572836Z               const issueNumber = process.env.CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER;
2026-04-14T02:34:08.8573510Z               if (!issueNumber || issueNumber === '') {
2026-04-14T02:34:08.8574206Z                 core.info('No issue was created; skipping triage dispatch');
2026-04-14T02:34:08.8574819Z                 return;
2026-04-14T02:34:08.8575221Z               }
2026-04-14T02:34:08.8575431Z 
2026-04-14T02:34:08.8575962Z               const issueNum = parseInt(issueNumber, 10);
2026-04-14T02:34:08.8576683Z               const repo = { owner: context.repo.owner, repo: context.repo.repo };
2026-04-14T02:34:08.8577535Z 
2026-04-14T02:34:08.8577988Z               const { data: issue } = await github.rest.issues.get({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum });
2026-04-14T02:34:08.8699613Z               if (issue.labels && issue.labels.length > 0) {
2026-04-14T02:34:08.8700532Z                 await github.rest.issues.setLabels({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum, labels: [] });
2026-04-14T02:34:08.8701427Z                 core.info(`Removed all labels from issue #${issueNum}`);
2026-04-14T02:34:08.8702027Z               }
2026-04-14T02:34:08.8702251Z 
2026-04-14T02:34:08.8704583Z               await github.rest.actions.createWorkflowDispatch({
2026-04-14T02:34:08.8705535Z                 ...repo,
2026-04-14T02:34:08.8706010Z                 workflow_id: 'issue-triage.lock.yml',
2026-04-14T02:34:08.8706538Z                 ref: 'main',
2026-04-14T02:34:08.8707303Z                 inputs: { issue_number: issueNumber }
2026-04-14T02:34:08.8707841Z               });
2026-04-14T02:34:08.8708321Z               core.info(`Dispatched triage for issue #${issueNum}`);

2026-04-14T02:34:08.8719249Z 
2026-04-14T02:34:08.8719409Z safe-outputs:
2026-04-14T02:34:08.8719803Z   report-failure-as-issue: false
2026-04-14T02:34:08.8720265Z   create-issue:
2026-04-14T02:34:08.8720622Z     max: 1
2026-04-14T02:34:08.8720974Z   noop:
2026-04-14T02:34:08.8721335Z     report-as-issue: false
2026-04-14T02:34:08.8721755Z   jobs:
2026-04-14T02:34:08.8722094Z     dispatch_triage:
2026-04-14T02:34:08.8722703Z       description: "Dispatch the issue triage workflow for the newly created issue"
2026-04-14T02:34:08.8723421Z       runs-on: ubuntu-latest
2026-04-14T02:34:08.8723850Z       needs: safe_outputs
2026-04-14T02:34:08.8724301Z       output: "Triage workflow dispatched"
2026-04-14T02:34:08.8724803Z       permissions:
2026-04-14T02:34:08.8725177Z         actions: write
2026-04-14T02:34:08.8725575Z         issues: write
2026-04-14T02:34:08.8725966Z       steps:
2026-04-14T02:34:08.8726346Z         - name: Dispatch triage workflow
2026-04-14T02:34:08.8726860Z           uses: actions/github-script@v9
2026-04-14T02:34:08.8727645Z           env:
2026-04-14T02:34:08.8728288Z             CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER: "${{ needs.safe_outputs.outputs.created_issue_number }}"
2026-04-14T02:34:08.8728989Z           with:
2026-04-14T02:34:08.8729346Z             script: |
2026-04-14T02:34:08.8729847Z               const issueNumber = process.env.CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER;
2026-04-14T02:34:08.8730488Z               if (!issueNumber || issueNumber === '') {
2026-04-14T02:34:08.8731153Z                 core.info('No issue was created; skipping triage dispatch');
2026-04-14T02:34:08.8731921Z                 return;
2026-04-14T02:34:08.8732306Z               }
2026-04-14T02:34:08.8732516Z 
2026-04-14T02:34:08.8732742Z               const issueNum = parseInt(issueNumber, 10);
2026-04-14T02:34:08.8733446Z               const repo = { owner: context.repo.owner, repo: context.repo.repo };
2026-04-14T02:34:08.8733933Z 
2026-04-14T02:34:08.8734365Z               const { data: issue } = await github.rest.issues.get({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum });
2026-04-14T02:34:08.8735187Z               if (issue.labels && issue.labels.length > 0) {
2026-04-14T02:34:08.8735995Z                 await github.rest.issues.setLabels({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum, labels: [] });
2026-04-14T02:34:08.8736927Z                 core.info(`Removed all labels from issue #${issueNum}`);
2026-04-14T02:34:08.8737757Z               }
2026-04-14T02:34:08.8737975Z 
2026-04-14T02:34:08.8738251Z               await github.rest.actions.createWorkflowDispatch({
2026-04-14T02:34:08.8738841Z                 ...repo,
2026-04-14T02:34:08.8739306Z                 workflow_id: 'issue-triage.lock.yml',
2026-04-14T02:34:08.8739816Z                 ref: 'main',
2026-04-14T02:34:08.8740284Z                 inputs: { issue_number: issueNumber }
2026-04-14T02:34:08.8740779Z               });
2026-04-14T02:34:08.8741255Z               core.info(`Dispatched triage for issue #${issueNum}`);
2026-04-14T02:34:08.8741677Z 
2026-04-14T02:34:08.8741824Z tools:
2026-04-14T02:34:08.8742152Z   web-fetch:
2026-04-14T02:34:08.8742506Z   github:
2026-04-14T02:34:08.8742870Z     toolsets: [issues, repos]
2026-04-14T02:34:08.8743153Z

2026-04-14T02:34:08.8743886Z [hash-debug] No template expressions (env./vars.) found in markdown body
2026-04-14T02:34:08.8744601Z [hash-debug] Canonical JSON (2168 chars):
2026-04-14T02:34:08.8760169Z {"frontmatter-text":"description: |\n  Documentation gap detector for the Azure SDK repository\n  Triggered on every push to main, analyzes diffs to identify documentation\n  gaps and files GitHub issues for Copilot coding agent to implement\n\non:\n  push:\n    branches: [main]\n  workflow_dispatch:\n\npermissions: read-all\n\nnetwork: defaults\n\nsafe-outputs:\n  report-failure-as-issue: false\n  create-issue:\n    max: 1\n  noop:\n    report-as-issue: false\n  jobs:\n    dispatch_triage:\n      description: \"Dispatch the issue triage workflow for the newly created issue\"\n      runs-on: ubuntu-latest\n      needs: safe_outputs\n      output: \"Triage workflow dispatched\"\n      permissions:\n        actions: write\n        issues: write\n      steps:\n        - name: Dispatch triage workflow\n          uses: actions/github-script@v9\n          env:\n            CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER: \"${{ needs.safe_outputs.outputs.created_issue_number }}\"\n          with:\n            script: |\n              const issueNumber = process.env.CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER;\n              if (!issueNumber || issueNumber === '') {\n                core.info('No issue was created; skipping triage dispatch');\n                return;\n              }\n\n              const issueNum = parseInt(issueNumber, 10);\n              const repo = { owner: context.repo.owner, repo: context.repo.repo };\n\n              const { data: issue } = await github.rest.issues.get({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum });\n              if (issue.labels && issue.labels.length > 0) {\n                await github.rest.issues.setLabels({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum, labels: [] });\n                core.info(`Removed all labels from issue #${issueNum}`);\n              }\n\n              await github.rest.actions.createWorkflowDispatch({\n                ...repo,\n                workflow_id: 'issue-triage.lock.yml',\n                ref: 'main',\n                inputs: { issue_number: issueNumber }\n              });\n              core.info(`Dispatched triage for issue #${issueNum}`);\n\ntools:\n  web-fetch:\n  github:\n    toolsets: [issues, repos]\n\ntimeout-minutes: 15"}
